---
title: "gaussian_pyramid"
generated: true
description: "Build a `levels`-deep anti-aliased Gaussian pyramid."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.geometry.pyramid`](../nitrix-geometry-pyramid.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:gaussian_pyramid -->
```python
gaussian_pyramid(image: Float[Array, '*spatial c'], *, levels: int, factor: float = 2.0, sigma: Union[None, float, Sequence[float]] = None, mode: str = 'reflect', method: Interpolator = Linear()) -> tuple[Float[Array, '*spatial c'], ...]
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:gaussian_pyramid -->
Build a `levels`-deep anti-aliased Gaussian pyramid.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:gaussian_pyramid -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `image` | `Float` | `*spatial` × `c` | — | Channel-last image, `(*spatial, c)` -- the finest level. |
| `levels` | `int` | — | — | Number of levels including the original (`>= 1`). |
| `factor` | `float` | — | `2.0` | Forwarded to [`downsample`](../nitrix-geometry-pyramid/downsample.qmd) for each coarsening step. |
| `sigma` | `Union[None, float, Sequence[float]]` | — | `None` | Forwarded to [`downsample`](../nitrix-geometry-pyramid/downsample.qmd) for each coarsening step. |
| `mode` | `str` | — | `'reflect'` | Forwarded to [`downsample`](../nitrix-geometry-pyramid/downsample.qmd) for each coarsening step. |
| `method` | `Interpolator` | — | `Linear()` | Forwarded to [`downsample`](../nitrix-geometry-pyramid/downsample.qmd) for each coarsening step. |

**Returns** `tuple[Float[Array, '*spatial c'], ...]`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:gaussian_pyramid -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
| `c` | feature channels (channels-last) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
